title: Neo-Beta Retexture
description: Classic blocks modernized to the new style!
body:
This resource pack takes some popular textures from classic Minecraft which were changed even before the texture update, and puts them in the new style. Imagine it as if the texture update happened much earlier.

The pack includes:

- The lapis lazuli block texture, recoloured in the more vibrant tones of beta and no border

- Crying obsidian, which flows between the blue of its beta texture, and also the red in the stone from glowing obsidian which is actually from Pocket Edition Alpha

- Sponges, with bigger holes like beta

This is all consistent with the current textures, and is a sort of addon for [my large enhancements pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/concept-enhancements), since they go well together. I hope you enjoy!

If you want static glowing obsidian, I did that too! https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/crying-obsidian-to-modernized-glowing-obsidian/

*Do not reupload. For use of my assets, modified or not, please request and obtain permission first!*
